arts.sum: Alexander Isak has now made his decision 🚨

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta fires strong warning to Liverpool over Premier League title race
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta fires a warning to Liverpool over their Premier League title hopes.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal actually have the money required to sign 'one of the best wingers' in the world in January
arts.sum: Stan Kroenke has opened his wallet🤑

arts.ttl: Arsenal January transfer window plans: Contracts, signings and targets
arts.sum: They are looking for a new young goalkeeper, especially after the permanent departure of Aaron Ramsdale in the summer, and young midfield player given both Thomas Partey and Jorginho will be out of contract in six months - but both can wait until the summer. Arsenal have several areas of the team in mind to strengthen in the longer term, especially given the contract situations around two midfielders in particular, and so January will be a reactive window.

arts.ttl: Frank: Arsenal are world's best at set-pieces
arts.sum: Frank feels they have perfected the art and said: "Arsenal is the best set-piece team, not only in the Premier League but in the world right now. The Gunners have earned a reputation for being the Premier League's most dangerous side from dead balls, with Mikel Arteta’s team scoring 32 goals from corners or free-kicks since the start of last season.

arts.ttl: 'What I can promise': Omar Marmoush reacts to exit links amid Liverpool and Arsenal transfer speculation
Arsenal flop celebrates New Year's Eve with new adult film star girlfriend
arts.sum: Last month, Trump seemingly confirmed her relationship with the former north London winger after sharing a picture of them together at dinner.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Arsenal Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Arsenal will be hoping to make it four wins in a row in all competitions when they make the trip across London to face Brentford on New Year’s Day. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our s...

arts.ttl: Arsenal star makes injury return vow after 'patient' Mikel Arteta message
arts.sum: Arsenal star Takehiro Tomiyasu has issued a message to the club's fans as he continues his recovery from injury. On New Year's Eve, Tomiyasu joined several Premier League stars in sending a message to fans to wish them well for the new year ahead.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's January transfer window simulated as £106m spent on three players
arts.sum: Instead, Arsenal's striker interest remained in the Premier League, with the Gunners signing Aston Villa's Jhon Duran for £49million, potentially rising to £64million with add-ons. Arsenal have struggled with their squad depth at times this season, so Mikel Arteta may be tempted to delve into the January transfer market in the new year.
